description_long: This is a freestanding step ladder with a robust A-frame design, primarily constructed from orange fiberglass side rails and black plastic or metal fittings at the top and feet. The ladder features five wide, flat metal steps on one side, providing stable footing for climbing, while the opposite side has two horizontal metal braces for structural support. The top platform is reinforced and includes a molded tray for holding tools or small items. Safety labels and branding are visible along the rails, and the feet are equipped with anti-slip caps for added stability. The overall build suggests durability and suitability for both indoor and outdoor urban maintenance tasks. The ladder's design allows it to be easily folded and transported by a single person.
description: A sturdy orange fiberglass A-frame step ladder with five metal steps, anti-slip feet, and a reinforced top tray. Designed for safe, portable use in urban maintenance or repair settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the A-frame structure, orange fiberglass rails, and two horizontal support braces.
description_view_1: Front view displaying five wide metal steps, the reinforced top tray, and anti-slip feet.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the support braces and absence of steps on this side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the steps, support braces, and the full width of the ladder's base.
